note: V12 Slingshot redesigned to emergency-only with 5 tiers and round-minute thresholds. T1 raised 14→20 min so the first tier fires only on real outliers (P~13.5% vs ~25%). New T5 at 180 min catches catastrophic multi-hour stalls (-50% drop). Final ladder: 20/30/60/120/180 min → -6.5/-12.5/-25/-37.5/-50%. Banner, indicator, paramText and tests all updated. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
